'''Boddu Bocck''' was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], wanted for crimes against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He had a [[Color/Legends|reddish]] beard and long [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and he often dressed in camouflage outfits suited for the terrain his particular jobs would require. He also wore a blast vest for added protection. [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] believed that Bocck lived out of a personalized [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]].

==Biography==
[[File:BocckBeylyssaTulga-IDC.png|thumb|left|200px|Boddu Bocck with his companions [[Beylyssa]] and [[Tolga]]]]

Boddu Bocck began his career in the [[Imperial Survey Corps/Legends|Imperial Scout Corps]], exploring new [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He would often bring back live or preserved samples from his missions, creatures or [[Sentience/Legends|intelligent]] beings. On his scouting missions, he began to favor the [[Malkanthi]] [[Mark VII power crossbow]]. When he took up [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]], Bocck continued to work for the Empire, as well as the underworld. He was responsible for the [[Assassin/Legends|assassinations]] of at least two teams of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]]. This, along with other crimes, earned him a posting in one of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken's]] ''Wanted by Cracken'' reports.

==Personality and traits==
Cracken speculated that pride could very well be Bocck's downfall, for he always boasted about the trophies he displayed at his hidden estate. He also would often show off his marksmanship, and Cracken knew why, because he had seen his skill at the [[Kellermin Competition]] on [[Resti Kel]].
